Home.title: Toopo
Home.description: Continuous, deterministic cartography of a codebase.

Health.title: API health
Health.description: Initial data fetched server-side, then refreshed on a fixed interval by TanStack Query.

common.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
common.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Start mapping your codebase in minutes.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.
forgotPassword.errorGeneric: Could not send the reset email. Please try again.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account exists for this email, a reset link is on its way.

resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Pick a strong, unique password.
resetPassword.errorGeneric: Could not reset your password. The link may have expired.
resetPassword.missingToken: This link is missing or invalid. Request a new reset email.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.pendingMessage: Check your inbox for a verification link.
verifyEmail.pendingMessageWithEmail: We sent a verification link to {email}. Check your inbox to finish setting up your account.
verifyEmail.resendSuccess: A new verification email is on its way.
verifyEmail.errorMessage: Could not resend the verification email. Please try again later.
verifyEmail.verifyingBody: Please wait while we confirm your email address.
verifyEmail.successMessage: Your email is now verified. You can sign in to continue.
verifyEmail.errorBody: This verification link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one below.

account.title: Your account
account.subtitle: Read-only profile. Full settings coming soon.

export.title: Export your data
export.description: Download a JSON file containing your profile, sessions, and connected accounts.
export.error: Could not export your data. Please try again.

delete.title: Delete your account
delete.description: Soft-deletes your account. It will be permanently removed after 30 days.
delete.confirmBody: This will sign you out everywhere and schedule your data for permanent deletion in 30 days. This action cannot be undone after the grace period.
delete.error: Could not delete your account. Please try again.

validation.not_integer: Field {path} must be a whole number
